hero.eyebrow: Leading medical tourism destination in Central Asia
hero.title: Discover World-Class Healthcare in the Heart of Central Asia
hero.subtitle: Receive high-quality medical care while discovering one of the world's fastest-growing destinations.

citySelection.title: Three World-Class Medical Cities
citySelection.subtitle: Each city offers unique medical strengths, modern facilities, and authentic Kazakh hospitality.

almaty.name: Almaty
almaty.description: Kazakhstan's largest city sits at the foothills of the Alatau Mountains, where world-class hospitals meet alpine landscapes and vibrant urban culture. Almaty blends cosmopolitan dining, museums, and mountain recreation with leading cardiac surgery, IVF, plastic surgery, and orthopedic centers — making it ideal for patients who want high-quality treatment and a memorable recovery environment.

astana.name: Astana
astana.description: Astana is Kazakhstan's modern capital — a city of striking futuristic architecture, excellent infrastructure, and the country's most advanced medical campuses. Patients travel here for neurosurgery, oncology, cardiology, and complex diagnostics, while enjoying landmarks like Bayterek Tower, the National Museum, and the Ishim River promenade during recovery.

shymkent.name: Shymkent
shymkent.description: Shymkent is a sunny southern city on the historic Silk Road, known for warm hospitality, affordable care, and easy access to nature reserves and cultural sites. It offers strong general surgery, dentistry, and diagnostic services alongside attractions such as Sayram, Aksu-Zhabagly Reserve, and traditional bazaars — a welcoming option for budget-conscious medical travelers.

whyKazakhstan.title: Why International Patients Choose Kazakhstan
whyKazakhstan.subtitle: Experience exceptional medical care in a country that combines modern healthcare infrastructure, affordability, and warm hospitality.

affordable.title: Affordable Healthcare
affordable.description: Save 40-60% compared to Western countries while receiving the same quality of care. Transparent pricing with no hidden costs ensures you know exactly what to expect.

specialists.title: Highly Qualified Specialists
specialists.description: Our partner hospitals employ doctors trained at leading international institutions, many with decades of specialized experience and international certifications.

equipment.title: Modern Medical Equipment
equipment.description: Access to state-of-the-art diagnostic tools, surgical robotics, and the latest medical technology found in top-tier facilities worldwide.

waiting.title: Short Waiting Times
waiting.description: Schedule consultations and procedures within days, not months. No long waiting lists mean faster access to the care you need.

support.title: International Patient Support
support.description: Dedicated multilingual coordinators guide you through every step, from initial inquiry to post-treatment follow-up, in your preferred language.

destinations.title: Beautiful Tourism Destinations
destinations.description: Combine medical treatment with exploration. Experience stunning mountain landscapes, vibrant cities, and rich cultural heritage during your recovery.

safety.title: Safe & Welcoming Environment
safety.description: Kazakhstan welcomes international visitors with visa-free entry for many countries, modern infrastructure, and a reputation for safety and hospitality.

care.title: Patient-Centered Care
care.description: Receive personalized attention with comfortable private rooms, family accommodation options, and care plans tailored to your specific needs.

umc-heart-center.description: Heart Center UMC is one of Central Asia's leading cardiac institutions, performing complex open-heart surgery, stenting, and arrhythmia treatment. International patients choose it for JCI-accredited standards, experienced cardiac surgeons, and a dedicated international coordination team.

national-scientific-medical-center.description: The National Scientific Medical Center in Astana is a high-technology hospital specializing in cardiac surgery, neurosurgery, and advanced cardiology. It serves as a national referral center for complex cases and offers modern operating theaters, ICU facilities, and multidisciplinary specialist teams.

national-hospital-almaty.description: The National Hospital under the MC of the President's Affairs is among Kazakhstan's most respected multidisciplinary institutions. It provides surgical, diagnostic, and rehabilitation services with JCI accreditation, making it a trusted choice for international patients seeking premium hospital care in Almaty.

syzganov-surgery-center.description: The Syzganov National Scientific Center of Surgery is a flagship surgical hospital in Almaty with deep expertise in transplantation, orthopedics, and advanced general surgery. Its national accreditation and research-driven approach attract patients requiring complex surgical interventions.

mediker-hospital-almaty.description: Mediker Hospital International offers multidisciplinary care with a strong international patient department and English-speaking staff. It is particularly known for dental implantology, cosmetic procedures, and coordinated care packages for foreign visitors.

shymkent-heart-center.description: Shymkent Heart Center has provided specialized cardiology and cardiac surgery since 2000. The center offers accessible pricing compared to Western markets while maintaining modern cath labs, surgical suites, and post-operative cardiac rehabilitation programs.

shymkent-diagnostic-center.description: The City Diagnostic Center of Shymkent is a modern facility combining advanced imaging, dentistry, and outpatient surgery. International patients value its efficient diagnostics, transparent pricing, and convenient location in southern Kazakhstan's medical district.

ekomed-ivf-shymkent.description: Ekomed Fertility & IVF Center is a dedicated reproductive medicine clinic offering IVF, ICSI, and fertility preservation programs. Couples from across the CIS and Middle East choose Ekomed for personalized fertility care and competitive treatment packages.

umc-mother-child.description: Mother & Child Center UMC in Astana is a JCI-accredited institution specializing in reproductive medicine, IVF, obstetrics, and neonatal care. Its integrated women's health campus provides end-to-end support from fertility consultation through pregnancy and delivery.

alanda-clinic-astana.description: Alanda Clinic is a modern multidisciplinary medical center in Astana offering reconstructive surgery, orthopedics, and inpatient recovery facilities. International patients appreciate its boutique hospital environment and personalized treatment planning.

american-medical-centers-almaty.description: American Medical Centers Almaty follows international clinical standards for family medicine, executive health check-ups, and dentistry. Expatriates and medical tourists often use AMC for preventive screenings, dental care, and English-language primary care before specialist referrals.

concierge.title: Personalized Patient Assistance
concierge.subtitle: Our medical concierge team coordinates your entire journey — clinic selection, accommodation, transfers, and follow-up care. Available 24/7 through our unified contact center.

testimonials.title: Trusted by Patients Worldwide
testimonials.subtitle: International patients from the USA, Europe, CIS, and the Middle East share their MedTour experience.

1.quote: MedTour made everything seamless — from clinic selection to hotel booking. I saved over 50% compared to London prices and received exceptional care at Premium Dental Center in Almaty.

2.quote: The contact center coordinated my entire journey. Interpreter support, airport transfers, and follow-up appointments were all handled professionally. Outstanding experience.

3.quote: We chose Kazakhstan for IVF after comparing options across Europe. The 7-day package included everything we needed. The team at Almaty IVF Institute exceeded our expectations.

4.quote: As an American patient, I was impressed by the JCI-accredited facilities and transparent pricing. The medical concierge answered every question before I even booked my flight.

5.quote: I referred my cousin from Germany through MedTour. The unified platform made it easy to compare clinics, packages, and accommodation in one place. Truly a centralized ecosystem.

6.quote: Professional from start to finish. The 14-day package gave me time to recover while exploring Astana. I felt supported every step of the way by the patient coordination team.

cta.note: Free consultation · No commitment · Serving patients from 40+ countries

categoryDetailsSuffix.check-up: Programs are delivered at internationally accredited partner hospitals with multilingual coordinators. Most check-ups can be scheduled within a few days for medical travelers.
categoryDetailsSuffix.ct: CT imaging uses modern multi-slice equipment with reports prepared by experienced radiologists. International patients receive clear documentation for follow-up care at home.
categoryDetailsSuffix.mri: MRI studies use high-field scanners for precise soft-tissue evaluation. Partner clinics coordinate scheduling, interpreter support, and result delivery.
categoryDetailsSuffix.ultrasound: Ultrasound is a safe, radiation-free diagnostic tool for screening and monitoring. Appointments are often available on short notice.
categoryDetailsSuffix.dentistry: Dental care is provided in clinics equipped for implants, prosthetics, and cosmetic dentistry with transparent pricing for international visitors.
categoryDetailsSuffix.xray: Digital radiography offers rapid imaging with minimal radiation. Results are reviewed promptly and shared for your home physician.
categoryDetailsSuffix.massage: Therapeutic massage supports recovery after travel or treatment. Sessions are tailored to your health status and comfort.
categoryDetailsSuffix.functional-diagnostics: Functional tests evaluate heart, lung, and metabolic performance non-invasively to support accurate diagnosis.
categoryDetailsSuffix.treatment-room: Minor procedures and infusions are performed under medical supervision — ideal for travelers needing same-day outpatient care.
categoryDetailsSuffix.certificates: Certificates are issued after a physician confirms fitness for work, sport, or travel per common international requirements.
categoryDetailsSuffix.cardiology: Cardiology services include advanced diagnostics and access to interventional specialists at leading cardiac centers.
categoryDetailsSuffix.gynecology: Women's health services are delivered with privacy and cultural sensitivity following international clinical standards.
categoryDetailsSuffix.neurology: Neurology consultations address headaches, seizures, and nerve conditions with access to EEG and imaging when needed.
categoryDetailsSuffix.orthopedics: Orthopedic specialists treat joint pain, sports injuries, and degenerative conditions with conservative and surgical options.
categoryDetailsSuffix.ophthalmology: Eye care ranges from routine exams to refractive surgery assessments using modern diagnostic equipment.
categoryDetailsSuffix.urology: Urology services cover prostate health, kidney conditions, and men's health screening with discreet professional care.
categoryDetailsSuffix.surgery: Surgical consultations include candidacy assessment, hospital selection, and pre-operative test coordination.
categoryDetailsSuffix.pediatrics: Pediatric care covers routine check-ups, vaccinations, and childhood illnesses in family-friendly environments.
categoryDetailsSuffix.dermatology: Dermatology addresses acne, eczema, moles, and skin concerns with biopsy and treatment options on site.
categoryDetailsSuffix.endocrinology: Endocrinology care focuses on thyroid disorders, diabetes, and hormonal imbalances with laboratory support.
